title: Journalists embrace AI despite rising concerns and threat to jobs, report reveals
description: Key Facts: Medianet revealed its latest Australian Media Landscape Report based on a survey of 803 journalists. 54% of journalists now use AI tools in their work (up from 37% in 2024), primarily for tasks like document summarising, transcription and research, with ChatGPT being the most popular tool 93% of journalists expressed concern about AI’s ... Continued

title: From Chips to Conflict: Why the AI Revolution Could sink in the Strait of Hormuz
description: The global artificial intelligence boom is facing a significant threat due to its heavy reliance on energy and chemical imports from the Middle East, which are now jeopardized by the conflict involving Iran.

title: Sunnyfield rolls out AI policy tool for care staff
description: Sunnyfield deploys an AI policy tool to 1,800 disability workers, giving real-time, multilingual safety guidance at the point of care.

title: Indian AI cos navigate tricky waters of war impact and rupee devaluation
description: Indian artificial intelligence startups are facing operational and cost challenges as well as uncertainty over plans to expand into West Asia amid the war in the region, multiple founders told ET. Some are seeing additional impact on margins from the rupee’s steep fall, they told ET.
